SGGF NoShadow (zero shadow).note: -0.19 dB vs full SGGF, shadow encoder contributes

SGGF Dec3Only (single-scale).note: -0.37 dB vs full SGGF, multi-scale fusion contributes

SGGF Gated (full, ref).note: full model with shadow encoder + multi-scale SGGF

SGGF Gated (256res).note: Lower than others on RDD, gating may need higher res

experiments_running_2026-07-08.GPU2_LPIPS_eval: LPIPS perceptual metric for all 7 SD7K models

SD7K→RDD FiLM.note: Best SSIM on RDD from SD7K training

cross_dataset.asymmetry_note: RDD→SD7K ~14.6 dB vs SD7K→RDD ~18.6 dB. Asymmetric domain gap — key finding!

lpips_perceptual.note: LPIPS↓ (AlexNet). Lower=better perceptual quality. No SGCA (concatenation) BEST! FiLM WORST despite best PSNR. Classic PSNR-perceptual trade-off.

CrossAttn.note: 256x256 due to OOM, low char count

paper_sections_mapping.Table 3 — Ablation Study: NoShadow + Dec3Only completed, validates both design choices
paper_sections_mapping.Table 5 — OCR Recovery: ALL 7 MODELS COMPLETED! Best: FiLM 101.3%, Gated 100.2%
paper_sections_mapping.Cross-dataset Generalization: BOTH directions done! Asymmetric gap: RDD→SD7K ~14.6 vs SD7K→RDD ~18.6 dB
paper_sections_mapping.SOTA Comparison: DocDeshadower SD7K done (21.81 dB), RDD training launched
paper_sections_mapping.SGGFv2 Learnable Temperature: Training on GPU0 — novel contribution for paper

key_findings.best_sd7k: SGFM FiLM: 24.77 dB (+1.34 vs baseline). But unstable on RDD (NaN).
key_findings.best_sd7k_stable: SGGF GatedLarge: 24.48 dB (+1.05 vs baseline). Fully stable, best TextPSNR (27.75).
key_findings.best_rdd: Large (dim=64): 37.05 dB. SGFM v2 close 2nd: 37.01 dB with best TextPSNR (33.89).
key_findings.ablation_shadow_encoder: NoShadow 24.12 vs Gated 24.31 -> shadow encoder worth +0.19 dB
key_findings.ablation_multiscale: Dec3Only 23.94 vs Gated 24.31 -> multi-scale fusion worth +0.37 dB
key_findings.sgfm_instability: tanh saturation causes NaN on RDD (two independent runs at E125/E130). Gradient clipping fixes it.
key_findings.domain_gap: Asymmetric: RDD->SD7K ~14.6 (catastrophic), SD7K->RDD ~18.6 (partial). Simple concat generalizes best.
key_findings.domain_gap_best_transfer: No SGCA (concat) best SD7K->RDD at 18.59 dB. Larger models generalize worse.
key_findings.overfitting_400ep: All three extended models (Gated, GatedLarge, FiLM) show overfitting at 400ep. 200ep optimal.
key_findings.efficiency: SGGF adds only 0.3M params and <1ms vs Restormer. CrossAttn uses 4x memory.
key_findings.ocr_512: All models achieve >98% character recovery at 512x512. FiLM leads at 101.3%.
key_findings.docdeshadower_baseline: DocDeshadower SD7K 21.81 dB vs our best 24.77 dB. +2.96 dB improvement over SOTA.
key_findings.sgfm_v2_rdd: Gradient clipping rescues FiLM on RDD: 37.01 dB with best TextPSNR (33.89).
key_findings.sggfv2: SGGFv2 with learnable temperature training — tests adaptive gating sharpness.
key_findings.lpips_surprise: No SGCA (concat) has BEST LPIPS (0.0461) while being simplest. FiLM has WORST LPIPS (0.0557) despite best PSNR (24.77dB). PSNR≠perceptual quality — major paper insight!
